title: atriplex calotheca
intro: Atriplex calotheca, also known as the saltbush, is a small shrub-like plant that is native to Australia. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as alleviating coughs and colds, and may also have antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Atriplex calotheca can be prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
